TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Ciwkangan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Nakahama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 239 buwan, 628 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 581 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 47 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 90%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciwkangan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Ciwkangan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Ciwkangan hya' ga Chenggong. tay mkraya' na Ciwkangan hya' ga Hualien. tay mkraya' na Ciwkangan hya' ga Makrahay. tay mkyahu' na Ciwkangan hya' ga Mornos. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Ciwkangan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiwkaŋan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu nakaħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiwkaŋan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiwkaŋan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiwkaŋan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨħeŋɣoŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiwkaŋan ħjaʔ ɣa ħualien. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiwkaŋan ħjaʔ ɣa makraħaj. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiwkaŋan ħjaʔ ɣa mornos~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨiwkaŋan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Ciwkangan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Nakahama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 239 buwan, 628 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 581 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 47 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 90%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciwkangan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Ciwkangan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Ciwkangan hya' ga Chenggong. tay mkraya' na Ciwkangan hya' ga Hualien. tay mkraya' na Ciwkangan hya' ga Makrahay. tay mkyahu' na Ciwkangan hya' ga Mornos. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Ciwkangan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiwkaŋan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu nakaħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiwkaŋan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiwkaŋan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiwkaŋan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨħeŋɣoŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiwkaŋan ħjaʔ ɣa ħualien. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiwkaŋan ħjaʔ ɣa makraħaj. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiwkaŋan ħjaʔ ɣa mornos~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨiwkaŋan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
